<Badge text="design-doc-mermaid" variant="note" /> <Badge text="20 words" variant="default" /> <Badge text="Curated" variant="note" /> <Badge text="install-now-after-trust-gate" variant="default" />

> Architecture diagram guidance for docs and design artifacts; complements local `docs-steward`.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add spillwavesolutions/design-doc-mermaid --skill design-doc-mermaid -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

**Use:** `/design-doc-mermaid`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from authoring SSOT `docs/src/authoring/skills/design-doc-mermaid.mdx` and `docs/public/generated-registries/skills-catalog-index.json` by `wagents docs generate`.
 Legacy projection `config/external-skills.md` remains dual-read during migration.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add spillwavesolutions/design-doc-mermaid --skill design-doc-mermaid -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Curated** (`curated-trust-gated`)

Curated status: `install-now-after-trust-gate`

Risk notes: Architecture diagram guidance for docs and design artifacts; complements local `docs-steward`.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Architecture diagram guidance using Mermaid for docs and design artifacts. Complements local docs-steward skill for producing visual system diagrams. Evidence gathered from upstream SKILL.md, READMEs, and repo structure via web research.

## Install Prerequisites

Install: `npx skills add spillwavesolutions/design-doc-mermaid --skill design-doc-mermaid -y -g -a antigravity, claude-code, codex, crush, cursor, gemini-cli, github-copilot, grok, opencode` status=install-now-after-trust-gate; selector=named

## Upstream Maintainer

[spillwavesolutions/design-doc-mermaid](https://github.com/spillwavesolutions/design-doc-mermaid)

## Comparable Alternatives

A general-purpose agent instruction without a scoped skill contract

&gt; Web research of upstream repo (SKILL.md/contents); evidence only, not authority. Use external-skill-auditor for live verification before install or promotion. Not an endorsement.
